feat.effect: (electricity) Your familiar flies around and around an adjacent ally’s weapon or hand, dissolving into multiple rings of lightning. Until the beginning of your next turn, the affected weapon or unarmed attack deals an additional 1d6 electricity damage, or 1d8 electricity damage if you Cast a Spell with the air or electricity trait this turn. Your familiar remains in lightning ring form, preventing it from being targeted or taking any actions.
feat.name: Lightning Rings' Overcharge
feat.text:
Your familiar can adopt an electrical form to empower weapon strikes. Your familiar gains the following ability.   
  
**Activate** Lightning Armillary;

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

traits.name: Electricity
traits.text: Effects with this trait deal electricity damage. A creature with this trait has a connection to magical electricity.

traits.name: Magical
traits.text: Something with the magical trait is imbued with magical energies not tied to a specific tradition of magic. Some items or effects are closely tied to a particular tradition of magic. In these cases, the item has the arcane, divine, occult, or primal trait instead of the magical trait. Any of these traits indicate that the item is magical.
